decision: DO NOT start prefill GEMM machine search. The dependency-free LDS GEMM kernel is at GPU-level Tensile parity on the prefill shape; GEMM tuning knobs are exhausted; and local kernel timing does NOT transfer to whole-prefill. A search would optimize a non-transferring, already-solved metric.

next_nonsearch_levers_ranked.desc: the 66%(graph-GEMM)->87%(Tensile) whole-prefill gap with a PARITY kernel = integration, not kernel. Needs a fresh SYNCED per-role in-model prefill time-tax (which roles/shapes fall back to slow WMMA; per-kernel launch/fusion overhead vs Tensile). This is the dominant lever and is NON-search.
deterministic hoist+strength-reduce of per-iteration index math in build_gemm_lds2 (the +23% VALU ISA-confirmed residual). Bounded hand-codegen fix, ISA-gated, must show W==P transfer.
engineering-ready (4 gates pass) but owner-pending on absolute-parity drift (max_abs_dNLL 0.0176 report-only); + PREFILL_V2 stays off (owner-decided, +14GB). Policy call, not perf work.
